programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles puts Daphne on a diet, unaware she has secret stashes of food hidden all over the place. Roz tries a new perfume guaranteed to have a devastating effect on men, while Frasier sets out to save station manager Kennys marriage - only to end up dating his wife

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles attends a Seattle SuperSonics basketball game with Frasier, where he is plucked out of the crowd at random and offered a big cash prize to sink a half-court shot. David Hyde Pierce stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz asks Frasier to narrate her documentary on the history of space travel - but he makes such a hash of it she ends up getting rid of him and recruiting former astronaut John Glenn instead. Meanwhile, Niles tries to relive his childhood by entering a kite-flying competition

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jeans Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chefs attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentists waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit an East Midlands reclamation yard, where they find a Russian motorbike and sidecar dating back to the Second World War and a 1970s fire surround

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The presenter makes a feeding station for the sheep on his mothers farm, while she moves the rapidly growing ducklings to an outside pen. The family start building an adventure playground for their pygmy goat herd out of recycled materials, and Nicola and Molly plant lavender for the bees

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Loretta and Carl from Leicester hope to find the perfect holiday home in the seaside resort of Mojácar in south-east Spain. With busy and stressful jobs, they want a bolthole in the sun where they can relax and unwind whenever they like. Laura Hamilton shows them five options within their £100,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Couple Paul and Fiona try to finish off their very lengthy renovations in France, while in Spain, new BandB owners Tom and Terry take stock and make plans. In Portugal, couple Leah and Joao try to break into Albufeiras busy cocktail bar scene

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul race to finish a risky new floor, six metres up, in Brittany, while Terry and Ashley gamble on their most lavish suite yet at Château de Lalacelle. At Château de la Grillère, Sharon and Tim race against time to complete their tower suite

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: As work on the upper level of the house finally finishes, the builders move onto the basement. But the dust, noise and stress start to take their toll, and just as Jon recovers from his broken leg and thrombosis, he has another major health setback, leaving the family wondering if the build is really worth it

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj Hogarth finally move into their 163-year-old chapel on Wales Llyn Peninsula - but the hard work is far from over as they get stuck into the next stage of the renovation, from clearing the stacks of unwanted items and creating spaces for guests to transforming the Sunday school into Keiths pottery studio. But first they must throw a gigantic pottery and vintage clothes sale to raise much-needed funds

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Pete and Aey order a factory-built house to be constructed in Wales and transported to their rural West Sussex plot, where they plan to demolish an older property to make way for the new one. But there are two big problems - the old house is home to hibernating bats, and moving five gigantic modules down tiny lanes from Wales to Sussex is not going to be easy

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Its the final, and just one hunt stands between the four remaining players and a prize of up to £100,000. But the last hunt comes with a fiendish twist and big-money challenges, meaning the players must deploy every ounce of skill, speed and determination to stay in the game

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sixty six-year-old Carol is rushed to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after a lighter ignited her oxygen-breathing tank, causing flash burn injuries to her face. Though chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and heart and lung failure mean she doesnt have long to live, Carol is determined to be there for her daughters wedding. After a full life and a career in the RAF, Trevor woke one morning to find that he was blind. He seeks help after falling down a flight of stairs at home. Plus, 71-year-old Grace is assisted after tripping and injuring her knee

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Race Across the World, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Last One Laughing, Secrets of the Bees, Just One Thing and Celebrity Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson is joined by 25 year-old Lauren, a movie buff and professional online gamer from Camberley who is looking for a geeky gamer to be her perfect player two so she can reboot her love life after three years of being single. Ryan who is 28 and from Cheltenham, is looking for his Mr Right. As a sucker for a silver fox and a dad bod, can he find his dream guy to wake up to every morning?

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Chelsea and George seek out a threesome with a woman, but will it help Chelsea move past Georges sexually adventurous past and infidelity? Jess and Ben host a naked dinner party, but Bens insecurities and Jesss social anxiety threaten to jeopardise their hopes of inviting married couple Olivia and Gage back for some intimate time in the bedroom

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Josh Pugh, Lorraine Kelly and Steve Bracknall for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete, beginning with Esther and Darryl, who fight for control in the kitchen. Next up are Louise and David, who aim to impress with their Welsh-themed evening, and give a revealing insight into their private lives. The contestants expect an extravagant party on the final night, which is hosted by Carl and Brian, before the winners of the £1,000 prize are announced

programme.title: Kirsties Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp comes to the rescue of Dave and Kate, whose house has been flooded

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George takes on a 17th-century, Grade II listed thatched cottage in Warwickshire. Anthony, a builder, and Emily, a physiotherapist, are determined to turn this rather ramshackle build into their family home. But they may have bitten off more than they can chew

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When a classy customer falls for Carla, no one can work out why shes not interested. It transpires she is convinced that in order to find her attractive, he must have some fatal flaw. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: One of Sams old friends bets he can break off his romance with Diane inside 24 hours - and starts by revealing he still has his infamous little black book packed with the phone numbers of gorgeous girls

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach is given the chance to manage a Little League baseball team, but pursues the task so ruthlessly that the bar-room regulars begin to question whether they know him at all. Nicholas Colasanto stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie decides 40 years of marriage to Frank is enough for any woman and moves in with Ray - to the delight of Robert, who enjoys being mothered by her. Debra is unhappy with the situation and tries to persuade her father-in-law to apologise, but he is enjoying the single life too much to agree

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debras snooty parents announce they are going to pay a visit - much to the dismay of Ray, who pleads with Frank and Marie to be on their best behaviour and avoid embarrassing him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray ignores Franks advice and loses all his cash in a poker game. Debra urges him to ask for the money back, but he is too proud to beg his father for help. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier search for a wealthy patron prepared to give their old school a much-needed cash injection, and soon find the ideal candidate - Martins new girlfriend. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce, with Barbara Babcock (Hill Street Blues)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Self-important corkmaster Niles arranges a boycott of Frasiers new radio show on wine appreciation, while Martin struggles to escape the powerful clutches of his new physiotherapist - until he samples her delicious cooking. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne breezes back into Niless life, sparking off an argument and casting a shadow over his chances of finding romantic fulfilment. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne tries to convince Niles she is psychic, while Frasiers former college professor and mentor comes to visit, and immediately forms a romantic attachment with Roz. Comedy, guest starring Rene Auberjonois (Star Trek: Deep Space Nine), with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bobs in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters arent improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before its too late

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien turns car seats into a three-piece suite during a trip to Leyland, while Henry Cole repurposes an overhead light into a fashionable light box

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The family call in the experts to help storm-proof the farmhouse that sits 1,000ft above sea level. Matt and Janice cant believe how quickly the new breed of lambs have grown and decide to bring in prized males. Progress has been made on the restoration of Mikes 1946 Dodge, and a local chainsaw carver makes a sculpture for the farm out of a storm damaged tree

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Anne-Marie and Adrian have been going to Los Cristianos in southern Tenerife for 12 years and consider it their second home. They would love to buy their very own holiday home there for a maximum budget of £160,000. Jean Johansson shows them five properties, hoping at least one will be perfect enough for Anne-Marie and Adrian to put in an offer

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, demolitions are under way at Tom and Terrys BandB. Eight years of building works have finished in France, but can Paul and Fiona successfully transition to hosting? And will Leah and Joaos efforts to open their cocktail bar pay off?

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In Normandy, Terry and Ashley race to finish the 401 Suite and re-hang a 200-crystal chandelier. At Château Mareuil, Belinda and Lee tackle mould in a tower. In the Loire Valley, Vivienne and Simon rush to finish a bathroom mural before Mum arrives

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jon is given the all-clear to return to his day job as a camera operator. Work starts in the garden and Jasmines carpenter brother Andrew gets involved, making bookshelves for Joys bedroom

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets Michelle and Derek, who have bought a cosy cottage in the South Downs National Park. The only problem is, it needs a lot of work and a lack of spare cash means they have to do most of the work themselves. Sarah also follows Archie and Lauren who have grand plans to add value to their Somerset home by building a large outdoor kitchen, and reveals more secrets of the trade at a Devon auction house

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu. Intelligence analyst Alexander Hale becomes prime suspect when his agency, the Orphanage, suspects a mole is operating within its ranks. But as he tries to prove his innocence, he makes a shocking discovery - his brain has been hacked, giving the perpetrators access to everything he sees and hears. Co-starring Melissa Barrera and Sinclair Daniel

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Forced into an uneasy alliance, Alexander and the Orphanage must work together to protect their discovery of the hack. Relying on a plan from untested agent Parker, a deadly trap dangles Alexander and Michelle as bait. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: In a mission where nothing is as it seems, Alexander must save a sources life by risking his own. Michelle gets a visit from the past. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews respond to headteacher Andy who has collapsed after a cardiac arrest in Essex and warehouse employee Rob who is trapped under a pallet of granite in Ipswich. Katie, who is 13-weeks pregnant, calls for help when she keeps having seizures and the Essex and Herts Air Ambulance crew help Jo who has been lying on the bathroom floor with a broken ankle for nine hours

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The sixth hunt gets underway, and a first-time Predators ruthless pursuit is soon rewarded, even if its not the capture some were hoping for. Alliances chop and change, and the Predators join forces to hunt one unlucky player, who assumes their fate is sealed. But back at basecamp, a last-minute plot turns the game on its head

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The final five players embark on their most important hunt yet. With one player still reeling from losing their last remaining ally, rivalries are at an all-time high and the last two Predators are determined to guarantee their place in the final. But as the Prey desperately try to evade capture, a last-minute move threatens one players place in the contest

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Wendi Peters and Ricky Groves go head to head as they take on lint roller printing, while Sharron Davies and Tanni Grey-Thompson have a slogan banner craft-off

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Race Across the World, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Last One Laughing, Secrets of the Bees, Just One Thing and Celebrity Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Britain is at war, and Emma frantically searches for a way to keep her businesses afloat. She has an ingenious plan, but its a huge gamble. Meanwhile, the men in Emmas life decide whether to sign up and risk their lives for their country. When a guilt-ridden Edwin enlists, Adam is willing to do anything to stop him, even prising open the past. In the 1970s, Paula and Emma are reunited as Paula rushes to warn her grandmother of a surprise twist in the coup against her

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: The war rages on. Emma is a widow and a single mother; business is failing and an unlikely alliance could be her only lifeline. In the 1970s, Emma returns home to Yorkshire for her 80th birthday party, armed with a cunning plan to outmanoeuvre her traitorous children, but another unseen betrayal is on the cards

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: A steam engine enthusiast embarks on an ambitious coast-to-coast journey across Devon, travelling across the countys rolling hills in an 80-year-old steamroller with a top speed of eight miles per hour. Farmers on Dartmoor rear a rare breed of sheep, while at Falmouth, a group of free divers explores a spectacular underwater cave

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Newmarket to find unexpected items in Margarets shed to make some cash for her local foodbank

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Warren struggles to trust his estranged brother Jenson. Diane makes a decision as her family struggle with her prognosis. A resident is forced to reveal the truth. And with things looking up, Donny proposes to Misbah, but its not long before their bubble bursts. Meanwhile, Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. A relationship is on the rocks. Froggy supports his grandson. Donny visits a former flame. And a mother is horrified by what she overhears... programme.desc: Debras snooty parents announce they are going to pay a visit - much to the dismay of Ray, who pleads with Frank and Marie to be on their best behaviour and avoid embarrassing him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray ignores Franks advice and loses all his cash in a poker game. Debra urges him to ask for the money back, but he is too proud to beg his father for help. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier search for a wealthy patron prepared to give their old school a much-needed cash injection, and soon find the ideal candidate - Martins new girlfriend. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce, with Barbara Babcock (Hill Street Blues)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Self-important corkmaster Niles arranges a boycott of Frasiers new radio show on wine appreciation, while Martin struggles to escape the powerful clutches of his new physiotherapist - until he samples her delicious cooking. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne breezes back into Niless life, sparking off an argument and casting a shadow over his chances of finding romantic fulfilment. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne tries to convince Niles she is psychic, while Frasiers former college professor and mentor comes to visit, and immediately forms a romantic attachment with Roz. Comedy, guest starring Rene Auberjonois (Star Trek: Deep Space Nine), with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bobs in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters arent improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before its too late

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien turns car seats into a three-piece suite during a trip to Leyland, while Henry Cole repurposes an overhead light into a fashionable light box

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The family call in the experts to help storm-proof the farmhouse that sits 1,000ft above sea level. Matt and Janice cant believe how quickly the new breed of lambs have grown and decide to bring in prized males. Progress has been made on the restoration of Mikes 1946 Dodge, and a local chainsaw carver makes a sculpture for the farm out of a storm damaged tree

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Anne-Marie and Adrian have been going to Los Cristianos in southern Tenerife for 12 years and consider it their second home. They would love to buy their very own holiday home there for a maximum budget of £160,000. Jean Johansson shows them five properties, hoping at least one will be perfect enough for Anne-Marie and Adrian to put in an offer

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Spain, demolitions are under way at Tom and Terrys BandB. Eight years of building works have finished in France, but can Paul and Fiona successfully transition to hosting? And will Leah and Joaos efforts to open their cocktail bar pay off?

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In Normandy, Terry and Ashley race to finish the 401 Suite and re-hang a 200-crystal chandelier. At Château Mareuil, Belinda and Lee tackle mould in a tower. In the Loire Valley, Vivienne and Simon rush to finish a bathroom mural before Mum arrives

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jon is given the all-clear to return to his day job as a camera operator. Work starts in the garden and Jasmines carpenter brother Andrew gets involved, making bookshelves for Joys bedroom

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets Michelle and Derek, who have bought a cosy cottage in the South Downs National Park. The only problem is, it needs a lot of work and a lack of spare cash means they have to do most of the work themselves. Sarah also follows Archie and Lauren who have grand plans to add value to their Somerset home by building a large outdoor kitchen, and reveals more secrets of the trade at a Devon auction house

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu. Intelligence analyst Alexander Hale becomes prime suspect when his agency, the Orphanage, suspects a mole is operating within its ranks. But as he tries to prove his innocence, he makes a shocking discovery - his brain has been hacked, giving the perpetrators access to everything he sees and hears. Co-starring Melissa Barrera and Sinclair Daniel

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Forced into an uneasy alliance, Alexander and the Orphanage must work together to protect their discovery of the hack. Relying on a plan from untested agent Parker, a deadly trap dangles Alexander and Michelle as bait. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sixty six-year-old Carol is rushed to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after a lighter ignited her oxygen-breathing tank, causing flash burn injuries to her face. Though chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and heart and lung failure mean she doesnt have long to live, Carol is determined to be there for her daughters wedding. After a full life and a career in the RAF, Trevor woke one morning to find that he was blind. He seeks help after falling down a flight of stairs at home. Plus, 71-year-old Grace is assisted after tripping and injuring her knee

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The hunt is on for a man who has assaulted an officer and dragged them along with his car before escaping. Sergeant Keith Bennet and PC Chris Turton search for a motorbike thief hiding in a wood in the dead of night. After reports come in of a man loitering in gardens in Birmingham, the team find out not everything is as it seems

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The sixth hunt gets underway, and a first-time Predators ruthless pursuit is soon rewarded, even if its not the capture some were hoping for. Alliances chop and change, and the Predators join forces to hunt one unlucky player, who assumes their fate is sealed. But back at basecamp, a last-minute plot turns the game on its head

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The final five players embark on their most important hunt yet. With one player still reeling from losing their last remaining ally, rivalries are at an all-time high and the last two Predators are determined to guarantee their place in the final. But as the Prey desperately try to evade capture, a last-minute move threatens one players place in the contest

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Wendi Peters and Ricky Groves go head to head as they take on lint roller printing, while Sharron Davies and Tanni Grey-Thompson have a slogan banner craft-off

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of property-hunters in Buckinghamshire and Berkshire. programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect meets Duncan and Josie, who are taking on an 18th-century barn perched on the edge of a pretty green, containing some very dodgy decor including a purple striped 80s kitchen and a miniature kitchen extension built to house a washing machine. Duncan and Josie need to make it liveable very quickly as they welcome their new baby Ruby, so George sets out to make the dark, cramped layout work for modern family living. He also heads to Southport, Merseyside, to see a Victorian gothic property in need of attention. Owners Jenny and Fadi are keen to resore the pile to its original splendor

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Evil Orthodontist

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fake Monica
programme.desc: Ross tries to find a new home for his pet monkey, which has reached puberty and begun driving everyone crazy with its uncontrollable antics. Meanwhile, Monica sets out to catch the thief responsible for stealing her credit card. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Ick Factor
programme.desc: Chandler finds his colleagues treat him differently since his promotion. Monica dates a high-school senior, and Rosss ex-wife goes into labour, while Rachel has a strange dream. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Carol finally gives birth, but Ross and Susan nearly miss out on the big event thanks to Phoebe, who locks them in a cupboard to stop them bickering. Meanwhile, Joey comes to the rescue of a pregnant woman at the hospital

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Finds Out

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery (1997)
programme.desc: A velvet-clad, sex-crazed secret agent from the 1960s agrees to be put into a state of suspended animation after his arch-enemy escapes justice. Thirty years later he is defrosted to do battle with the power-mad villain again, but the mission proves nearly as daunting for him as getting to grips with 1990s social values. Spoof spy adventure, with Mike Myers, Elizabeth Hurley, Mimi Rogers, Michael York and Robert Wagner

programme.title: Lee Evans Live: The Different Planet Tour
programme.desc: The comedian delivers a stand-up performance as he finishes his 1996 UK tour with a gig in Londons West End. Among the topics of discussion are planes, shops and restaurants

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Improvisational game show, with challenges including a bad dancing news flash, and a packed Scenes from a Hat, where the performers reveal the worlds worst battle cry, unlikely news reports and documentaries no one would watch

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.sub-title: The One with the Baby on the Bus

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian is joined by guests Emma Bunton and Judge Rinder for an evening of entertainment, recorded live in front of an audience at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.sub-title: Rachel Nickell: 16 Year Hunt for Justice
programme.desc: The circumstances surrounding the murder of 23-year-old Rachel Nickell in July 1992, when she was attacked and killed in front of her two-year-old son Alex on Wimbledon Common. Colin Stagg was originally charged with the murder, but was eventually acquitted in September 1994 before the case went cold. With more advanced and refined forensic techniques available, Scotland Yard later reopened the investigation and in December 2008 Robert Napper - already serving time in prison for another killing - pleaded guilty to Nickells manslaughter

As he prepares to take full responsibility for the firm, Courtland dons a disguise to go incognito among the staff and find out how the frontline employees really feel

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Todd Pedersen, CEO and founder of Vivint, a leading solar and home security business, based in Utah, goes undercover among his own workforce posing as a contestant on a reality show. Hes proud to head an organisation that provides a fun and relaxed work environment, but now that the company is offering smart home technology, its in competition with much larger organisations, and Todd wants to make sure its fully prepared to take them on

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? Chandra and Tom have decreased the value of their property and are stuck in real-estate limbo. The brothers attempt to raise the bar with an ambitious upgrade as the couple try to agree on their next move

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, married couple Paul and Debbie kick off the competition with a menu of tried and tested dinner party favourites. However, engaged couple Angela and John arent impressed by their simple fare and posh couple Kirsty and James find Pauls behaviour even less palatable. Perfectionists Angela and John cook up dishes inspired by their favourite restaurant meals. Finally, Kirsty and James plan an organic, locally sourced menu. At the table theres a lesson in asparagus eating and the hosts get a dose of their own medicine when their guests return their food criticism

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Cheshire, compete to host the best dinner party, with Faye and Chris, Dawn and Keith, and Mark and Shaun hoping to walk away with the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Mark plans a West Country farm-themed shindig - complete with pig racing, a Wurzels tribute act and a tractor for transport - for his elegant bride-to-be Alex, who is hoping for a wedding inspired by Downton Abbey

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill-seeker Craig plans an adrenaline-fuelled wedding for his country bride-to-be Ellie, complete with a sky-diving entrance and a bungee-jumping ceremony. However, her ideal day consists of a traditional service in their local village church

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Ashley and Brandon Wright, the co-owners of Hamburger Marys, go incognito in their own company, hoping to ensure that their culture of diversity and acceptance is maintained as the business expands. Ashley goes undercover to appear with drag performer Jayla at a brunch show, and Brandon works a shift with bar manager Melissa, who feels underappreciated after eight years of hard work

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Dan Duffy, the Chief Executive of United Real Estate Group, adopts a disguise to go undercover in his own company. Dan meets many different employees to learn about their professional standards and also their personal lives.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chefs attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw-ups?Nurse Jenna and firefighter Neil are ready to settle down in a home of their own. But first, they need to sell his frat house. While a crew of firefighters pitch in to tackle the demolition, theres an electrical upgrade shock. Can the place be revived and smoke out the real estate competition? Short:Nurse Jenna and firefighter Neil need to sell his frat house before they can settle down in their own home. Can the place be revived and smoke out the competition?

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: There are consequences when Jared and Kyle argue, Cat struggles to find her place on the yacht and the exterior wrestle with a difficult docking, while Eileen gets under everyones skin. A night in the hot tub has long-lasting repercussions

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former drama student Jack hopes to impress his husband-to-be James with a Shakespeare-themed wedding - with a performance complete with a cast of actors and a pair of donkeys - despite his partners hopes for a more traditional big day

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Steve from Rotherham, South Yorkshire, is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee the wedding of her dreams, while she relinquishes control of the big day. programme.desc: Lowell Hawthorne, the President and CEO of Caribbean food producers Golden Krust, dons a disguise to go undercover among the workforce in his own company. programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef travels to the Peak District to visit his favourite formal vegetable garden at Chatsworth House, before crossing the River Severn to sample the delights of Wales, including cawl, Welsh black cattle, Conway mussels and salt marsh lamb

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef begins a culinary romp around Britain, sampling some of the local dishes he holds dear. His journey begins in Lands End, where he goes on a pigeon shoot, before fishing for mackerel on the coast of Falmouth. Culinary highlights include forgotten dishes like pigeon and peas, and clotted cream with langoustine quiche

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The seafood chef continues his culinary tour of Britain, meeting happy pigs on the Isle of Wight, sampling real cider in Somerset and tasting hot peppery watercress from Hampshire before tickling his tastebuds with Thomas Hardys favourite cheese

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a towering chocolate birthday cake with Tyler Florence, and the duo visit the local farming scene to buy some chicken and vegetables

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining home-bakers face a brand new Bake Off challenge, as Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry challenge them to prove their mastery of classics recipes from the Victorian era. The reign of Queen Victoria is thought to have been the period of history that gave birth to modern baking, and for the signature bake, the contestants are asked to produce a game pie, which gives one enthusiastic competitor a chance to use a genuine antique from 1850. Mary sets the bakers to work on a fruit cake from the late 1800s in the technical, creating a finished product covered in sugar paste and marzipan that should resemble a tennis court. Finally, for the showstopper, the competitors must prepare Charlotte Russe, a bavarois, sponge fingers and jelly dessert much-loved by the Victorians, but one that proves tricky to construct at the best of times

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The five remaining bakers tackle patisserie in the quarter-finals, making 24 cream horns for their signature challenge, before creating mokatines for Marys technical bake. For the showstopper, the cooks are challenged to make a religieuse à lancienne - three tiers of choux pastry eclairs filled with creme patissiere and decorated with icing and buttercream. The contestants must produce something that not only looks and tastes good, but also stays standing before judges Mary and Paul cast a critical eye over their efforts. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James Martin is joined by chef Galton Blackiston in Norfolk, and the pair visit Galtons successful fish and chip shop, which inspires James to cook a fish dish on the beach. Later, James heads to Norfolk Lavender to find out why it grows so well in this county and how it is distilled for oil, before making a very special deep-fried soft-boiled egg salad with croutons and bacon

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: The chefs countrywide tour brings him to London, where he stops off for a bite to eat at new restaurant Core owned by Clare Smyth, and visits a knife forge, where he learns the process of making Japanese-style knives. He also heads along the Thames to the village of Bray, home to the Waterside Inn restaurant. Here he catches up with old friends Michel Roux Sr and his son Alain

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: The chef prepares the perfect meals for social events, beginning with a celebratory meal for family and friends to make up for 18 months of missed family milestones. He showcases a slow-roasted, rolled shoulder of lamb with a fennel, sage and spicy sausage stuffing, drizzled with a herby green sauce made with pistachio, mint and parsley. On the side, Jamie pairs it with crispy lemon roast potatoes, garlicky dressed French beans and a thyme and apricot sauce. He also creates rainbow tomato crostini topped with crumbly cheese, mango caipirinha cocktails, and individual yoghurt panna cottas with elderflower strawberries and a crushed biscuit crumb

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Over the past 10 weeks, the bakers have taken part in 27 challenges, tackling baking disciplines from cakes to bread, pastry to puddings, and biscuits to chocolate. Now, three contestants remain and they must face one more weekend of baking before this years winner is chosen. The signature challenge sees them take on enriched dough as they make filled iced buns, and in the technical the finalists must prove they have mastered something they have all previously struggled with. For the showstopper, they must achieve perfection as they bake classic British cakes in the hope of impressing Mary and Paul for the last time

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Still in Hampshire, James views ex-formula one racer Jody Scheckters epic car collection, and learns of his passion for buffalo mozzarella, which he makes in his dairy. James uses some of the cheese in his buffalo mozzarella, blackberry and beetroot salad, before crossing into Sussex to don fancy dress and experience the Goodwood Revival, which celebrates motorsport from the 1940s to the 1960s. The presenter offers a classic comfort recipe - roast pork with black pudding fritters and caramelised apples as he prepares to watch some of his friends race in the Goodwood Revival TT race

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James is joined by chef and restaurateur Mark Sargeant in Kent, where they cook on the regenerated Folkestone Harbour Arm they and visit a sourdough and beer suppliers located in a shipping container. Mark then takes James on a tour of his Rocksalt restaurant, where he samples the award-winning cuisine before returning to the harbour for one last recipe featuring Folkstone fish

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The chef gets a taste for free-range geese in Leicestershire, and also samples Suffolk black pork and bitter from Southwold

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef heads for Lancashire to sample hotpot, black puddings and an acclaimed crumbly cheese, then visits the Lake District, where he discovers wild boar and the famous Herdwick sheep

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree cooks up ranch chicken taquitos with sour cream dip, hearty Mexican rice and beans, and a delicious dessert

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a Mississippi mud cake and white chocolate macadamia nut cookies. Plus, she shows how to make her easy chocolate tart

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: The chef prepares the perfect meals for social events, beginning with a celebratory meal for family and friends to make up for 18 months of missed family milestones. He showcases a slow-roasted, rolled shoulder of lamb with a fennel, sage and spicy sausage stuffing, drizzled with a herby green sauce made with pistachio, mint and parsley. On the side, Jamie pairs it with crispy lemon roast potatoes, garlicky dressed French beans and a thyme and apricot sauce. He also creates rainbow tomato crostini topped with crumbly cheese, mango caipirinha cocktails, and individual yoghurt panna cottas with elderflower strawberries and a crushed biscuit crumb

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: The American chef is joined by Michael Symon and the duo prepare a Greek menu including smoked pork ribs, tzatziki and spicy houmous

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a chocolate-themed menu including cupcakes with a peanut butter frosting, chocolate gelato, a chocolate orange fondue and white chocolate truffles

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers get to grips with chocolate in the semi finals, making chocolate tarts for their signature challenge, a chocolate souffle for the technical bake and chocolate centrepieces for the showstopper. As always, the contestants are tasked with producing something that looks and tastes good, before judges Mary and Paul cast a critical eye over their efforts. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Over the past 10 weeks, the bakers have taken part in 27 challenges, tackling baking disciplines from cakes to bread, pastry to puddings, and biscuits to chocolate. Now, three contestants remain and they must face one more weekend of baking before this years winner is chosen. The signature challenge sees them take on enriched dough as they make filled iced buns, and in the technical the finalists must prove they have mastered something they have all previously struggled with. For the showstopper, they must achieve perfection as they bake classic British cakes in the hope of impressing Mary and Paul for the last time

programme.title: Paul Hollywood: City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul visits Hollywood for the very first time. He explores the Los Angeles baking scene. He meets locals and learns how to make some traditional baked goods

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: The murder of Frank Rodriguez, orchestrated in September 2000 by his wife Angelina who hoped to collect $250,000 from his life insurance. At first the cause of death was inconclusive, but as a cause was required to collect the money, Angelina claimed to have received an anonymous phone call advising her Frank had been poisoned with antifreeze. When it was proven no such call had been received and an autopsy verified the details as correct, it became clear she had incriminated herself

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part

programme.desc: Part one of two. Steve tries to retrieve secret papers from a yacht, but someone beats him to it. Lee Majors and Britt Ekland star

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An ambitious detective tries to frame one of Hookers friends in connection with a gang of jewel thieves. Guest starring Jerry Lee Lewis

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex and Trivette become imprisoned by a former adversary who is seeking revenge

programme.title: Alive (1993)
programme.desc: A plane carrying a college rugby team smashes into a mountain in the Andes, leaving the survivors stranded in unbearably bleak conditions. As supplies dwindle, they are faced with the horrifying prospect of eating their dead to ensure they make it through the ordeal. Fact-based drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Vincent Spano and Josh Hamilton

programme.title: How I Spent My Summer Vacation (2012)
programme.desc: A getaway driver crashes his car in Mexico, leading to the authorities seizing his ill-gotten gains and condemning him to a violent, lawless prison dominated by gangs. A boy who has also been locked up there proves an unlikely ally in helping him survive, and he hatches a plan to escape and recover his money. Crime thriller, starring Mel Gibson and Kevin Hernandez

programme.title: The Family (1970)
programme.desc: After being double-crossed by his mistress, a hit-man sets out to take his revenge on the woman and the mob boss who put her up to it. Thriller, starring Charles Bronson

programme.title: The Witches (1966)
programme.desc: A teacher goes to Africa to work at a missionary school, but has a traumatic encounter with a local witch doctor that drives her to a nervous breakdown. She returns to teach in a quiet English village, only to suspect a coven of witches is performing dark rituals - a claim that leads people to suspect she is going mad. Hammer horror, starring Joan Fontaine and Kay Walsh

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex and Trivette become imprisoned by a former adversary who is seeking revenge

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An ambitious detective tries to frame one of Hookers friends in connection with a gang of jewel thieves. Guest starring Jerry Lee Lewis

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.sub-title: Wine, Women and War - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Steve tries to retrieve secret papers from a yacht, but someone beats him to it. Lee Majors and Britt Ekland star

programme.title: Shark Lake (2015)
programme.desc: The arrival of an exotic animal smuggler fresh out of prison in a small town coincides with a series of grisly deaths. It emerges that a family of man-eating sharks the ex-convict was transporting are loose in the lake, and he is forced into an uneasy alliance with a local cop to deal with the predators. Thriller, starring Dolph Lundgren and Sara Malakul Lane

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The Pledge (2008)
programme.desc: A vengeful sheriff tracks down the escaped killer who murdered his family, but in the ensuing confrontation he accidentally shoots an innocent bystander. To make amends, he swears to protect the dead mans widow, whose ranch is under threat from a ruthless land baron. Western, starring Luke Perry, C Thomas Howell, Kim Coates and Jaclyn DeSantis

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.sub-title: Where No Man Has Gone Before
programme.desc: The Enterprise collides with a barrier at the edge of the galaxy - and officers including Kirks oldest friend begin to develop superhuman powers. William Shane, Leonard Nimoy and Gary Lockwood star

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.sub-title: Wine, Women and War - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two. Steve infiltrates a terrorist complex to find the stolen missiles. Concluding part of the second pilot film, starring Lee Majors and Britt Ekland

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: A hearing-impaired 14-year-old gang member is conned into taking the rap for a murder committed by big-time drug dealer Carlos Vega. Vintage police drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trivettes brother Simon is arrested and confesses that he has been ordered to kill his sibling

programme.title: Survivor (2015)
programme.desc: A US embassy official based in London goes on the run after being framed for a terrorist bombing, in which several of her colleagues are killed, and discovers a plot to detonate another bomb in Times Square during New Years Eve celebrations in New York. Thriller, starring Milla Jovovich, Pierce Brosnan and Dylan McDermott

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A CIA agent learns he is dying, and decides to quit the agency so he can spend his last few months trying to rebuild his relationship with his estranged daughter. He is tempted to go back on his word when an old colleague offers him an experimental drug that could save his life - if he agrees to carry out one last mission. Action thriller, starring Kevin Costner, Amber Heard and Hailee Steinfeld

programme.title: Edge of the World (2021)
programme.desc: Adventure telling the story of the Rajah of Sarawak, James Brooke, an inspiration for the Rudyard Kipling story The Man Who Would Be King and Joseph Conrads novel Lord Jim. Brooke defied the British Empire to rule a jungle kingdom in 1840s Borneo, embarking on a lifelong crusade to end piracy, slavery and head-hunting. Starring Jonathan Rhys Meyers, Josie Ho, Dominic Monaghan and Ralph Ineson

programme.title: Southern Fury (2017)
programme.desc: When his brother falls foul of a ruthless mobster, a straight-laced man calls on his old friend and cop to help out. Crime thriller, starring Adrian Grenier, John Cusack and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Former boxer Paul, 22, has been stabbed in the face and arm with a broken bottle outside a nightclub in Kingston. As the team works to stop the bleeding and treat the patients wounds, his girlfriend Naveena reflects on his sensitive side. Angela, 93, is brought to AandE by her daughter Elizabeth after suffering from blood loss and disorientation at her care home, while 70-year-old John arrives with his wife Francesca after falling while out running and dislocating his shoulder. To get Johns pain under control quickly the medics give him ketamine, and the hallucinogenic side effects keep everyone entertained

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics in the East Midlands race to free Valerie from her car after it was t-boned by a lorry. In Norwich, the medics rush to the aid of 15-year-old Henry whos fallen 20 feet when a large kite dragged him off his feet into the air, and medics suspect Ellana may have a serious head injury after a road traffic collision in Leicester trapped her in her vehicle

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The trauma team at St Georges Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks campers arrive at Dalraddy Holiday Park on a traditional Scottish estate at Aviemore. Without leaving the site, campers Jen, Ian and Ellis, Sean and Marie, and Emmy and Simon take a train ride, enjoy some quirky Highland games and battle it out on the paintballing field

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry and Simon head to Pembrokeshire to meet mechanic James, whose family have a stack of sheds crammed with classic cars, motorbikes and tractors, including a 1928 Model A Ford

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Suffolk to meet friends John and Jane who have been collecting and swapping items for many years

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Carl Insley and best friend Sharon are the hosts at Driftwood Luxury Lodges in Dale Abbey in Derbyshire, where they offer a luxury glamping experience. The stylish home-made furniture is a hit, although one camper notices it might not be very practical, and while the continental breakfast is a hit with one couple, others find it hard to swallow

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Grantham Arms in Boroughbridge, North Yorkshire, run by Simon Wade, who is joined in the competition by his right-hand man Joe Graves. Their guests are immediately dazzled by the decor, and the good vibes continue on a day out to a mystical cave. At breakfast, everyone is in awe of Joes hosting. However, Simon and Joe are puzzled by some snippy feedback about their room prices

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers head to Southport, where husband and wife Rick and Sarah Blaney run the Stamford. However, things do not get off to a great start when Annelies and Claudia are left out in the cold by the self check-in

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother-and-daughter team Annelies and Claudia Richardson host the weeks last visit at the Fauconberg Arms in Coxwold, North Yorkshire. Their ethos is that food is just as important as the rooms, but this threatens to prove their downfall when Rick and Sarah have reservations about cleanliness

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On Payment Day, Carl is keen to quiz Simon and Joe over their breakfast woes, while Rick and Sarah want to know why they were scored so badly for their hosting skills. Meanwhile, Annelies and Claudia from the Fauconberg Arms want to wipe the slate with Sarah and Ricks cleanliness critique

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal assistant Lisa hosts the first of five parties from in and around Birmingham, with the 53-year-old self-proclaimed domestic goddess hoping a menu straight from her Malaysian roots will impress other contestants Akil, Sonia, Martha and Mark

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is day two of the competition in Birmingham, and 37-year-old shopping channel producer Martha is hoping to educate - as well as entertain - her guests with a vegan feast

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mark hosts the third night of the culinary competition taking place in Birmingham, hoping to impress his guests with a menu of classic comfort food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Youth worker Sonia is in charge on day four in Birmingham and after three nights of vegan chat from Martha, the host makes a pact with the others to ban any mention of the subject

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final day of the competition in Birmingham sees 32-year-old aquarium designer Akil act as host, hoping to create a splash with his fish-themed menu. With a home-made seafood tempura to start and a double whammy of sea bass and scallops for the main, Akil goes all out to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition begins in Abersoch, north Wales, at NightSky Glamping, run by Angie Howarth and her daughter Caitlin. Things get off to a good start when Sophie and her fiance Sam lap up the luxury in their safari tent - especially the hot tub - and Morgan falls in love with the view. However, some dusty decorations disappoint Kadir. After a trip to the beach for an afternoon of bodyboarding, Morgan reveals that he isnt a fan of camping

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Johnny Doughs Restaurant with Rooms in Conwy, north Wales, run by Morgan Austin. Angie and Caitlin are stunned by the sights, but a hairy bed gets Kadirs stay off on the wrong foot. The guests are whisked off on a boat trip to enjoy Conwy from the water. As well as loving the landscape, they get a peek into host Morgans surprising past

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Royal Oak in the Peak District, run by Kadir Ustun, is the weeks third location. Kadir prides himself on the warm welcome he provides, but mould in their respective bathrooms puts off two sets of guests straight away. Fortunately for Kadir, spirits are lifted after a day out caving at a local attraction - the interestingly named Devils Arse. The next day, the BandBers are divided over breakfast, with some raving about it while others are left disappointed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sam Harrison and Sophie Germany host the final visit of the week at the Dovecote Inn in Nottinghamshire. Morgan marvels at his room, but Kadir is determined to inspect every nook and cranny after receiving frosty feedback from Sam and Sophie when he hosted. An underwhelming day out touring the village of Laxton is saved only by the hosts personalities, though later two of the BandBers have a disagreement over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, Angie and Caitlin are keen to get to the bottom of some cutlery quibbles. Morgans upset about some cleanliness complaints, while Kadir thinks some of his fellow BandBers have been unfair by saying they wouldnt return to his BandB

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp searches for a family home around Hove on the south coast of England for Duncan, Anna and their three children, as they return from seven years living in Switzerland. Elsewhere, Phil Spencer helps couple Mick and Bernie look for a property to downsize to when they retire in the South Downs

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Carl and Katy decide whether to renovate or sell their three-bedroom Victorian semi-detached home in Chester. Carl thinks moving somewhere new with more space for their two children and to work from home that is more energy-efficient would be the best choice, but Katy is convinced they can solve all their problems with a roof-raising renovation

programme.title: Great Estates from Above
programme.desc: Following head gardener at Penshurst Place, Tony, through the seasons as he looks after one of the oldest privately owned gardens in the country. And theres a look around the estates 50-year-old toy museum

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Paul, 38, is rushed into resus after falling 25ft. He is experiencing shooting pains in his back and pins and needles in his feet, leading to concerns he may have injured his spine. Meanwhile, 66-year-old Anthony, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinsons disease and prostate cancer, has taken a tumble down a flight of stairs at home. Hes very frail and a scan reveals he has broken some ribs, puncturing a lung

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics fly to the aid of mountain biker Rob in the Cumbrian mountains. Off-road motorbiker Dean is set to miss his friends 50th birthday celebrations after taking a nasty tumble. Plus, 15-year-old Robbie needs urgent care when he falls from a coastal cliff in South Shields

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics battle to keep 48-year-old Paul alive as he suffers a series of heart attacks. Rogers emergency stop halts his day at a scooter rally while, in Cumbria, theres a dramatic mountainside rescue for seriously injured cyclist Nick

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Paul, 38, is rushed into resus after falling 25ft. He is experiencing shooting pains in his back and pins and needles in his feet, leading to concerns he may have injured his spine. Meanwhile, 66-year-old Anthony, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinsons disease and prostate cancer, has taken a tumble down a flight of stairs at home. Hes very frail and a scan reveals he has broken some ribs, puncturing a lung

To get Johns pain under control quickly the medics give him ketamine, and the hallucinogenic side effects keep everyone entertained

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: With their tour of the Highlands drawing to a close, the campers head for Scotlands northern coast, pitching up at Barrow Campsite near Nairn. Having visited five campsites, its time for Sean and Marie, Simon and Emmy, and Ian, Jen and Ellis to pick this weeks perfect pitch. But first - theres some paddleboarding, beach yoga and campfire cocktails to enjoy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit two sisters at their south Wales workshop, where their restorations and upcycles include a Gothic-style organ and a half-size snooker table

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole comes across a tractor and Simon OBrien finds a small-wheeled design classic as the pair search for money-making items in Norfolk

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first of this weeks destinations is The View in Tynemouth, where guests take a a picturesque steam train journey, but are less than happy to be sharing a bathroom

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The best-value BandB contest continues at Northern Hotel in Angus, where everything is going great for Pawel and Joanna until breakfast time, when the hosts crumble in the kitchen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals stay over at the Kirkstyle Inn in Dunning, Perth, where the quirky design and a leaky ceiling do not work in host Jesss favour. Can she swing things round at breakfast?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Hazeldene Guest House in Perth, run by hospitality veterans Rob and Glenda. Jess isnt awash with praise for the bathrooms, but a tipsy trip to a whisky distillery puts everyone in good spirits. Breakfast is also a hit, but the hosts have a nagging feeling that one BandBers feedback could make for difficult reading

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers confront each other about their stays at The View, Northern Hotel, The Kirkstyle Inn and Hazeldene Guest House. There are some frosty heating comments and breakfast bombshells, before the payments are revealed and the winners announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in the West Midlands, cheerful 42-year-old teaching assistant Sunita goes all out to stimulate her guests taste buds, hoping an authentic Punjabi feast will impress Liz, Digby, George and Tutsi

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, half-Egyptian property investor Liz treats her guests to a taste of the Middle East and some startling revelations

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night of the competition taking place in the West Midlands, male model George treats his guests to a mixture of Greek, Caribbean and Italian food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, social worker Tutsi serves up a mixture of Zimbabwean and English dishes. One of Tutsis guests harbours a grudge about some of her previous comments, while some close-to-the-bone nicknames are thrown around the table and theres a very mixed reaction to a surprise worm-eating competition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in the West Midlands, dark horse Digby plans to surprise his guests with an evening of fancy fine dining. However, Digbys biggest challenge proves to be maintaining harmony between his guests, with George still upset with Sunita for dissing his food and with straight-talking Tutsi trying to pay Liz a compliment which is misinterpreted

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This weeks competition begins in Newquay in Cornwall, at Avalon Guest House, where the owners taste in lime green decor does not prove as relaxing as planned for the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers spend the night at the Bear Inn at Wincanton, Somerset, where ex-Army man Matt Garvin takes them for a day of survival training - and as a trained chef, hopes to serve up a perfect breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals head to Bournemouth, where Chris and Nicky Horton run the Chelsea Hotel. For entertainment, they treat the guests to a day on the water - but the weather is against them

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to the Holford Arms in Tetbury in Gloucestershire, where Will Robson and Loz Cooper are hoping to put their pubs prized produce into the spotlight to ensure the BandBers have a fulfilling stay. However, the bedrooms produce some unwelcome surprises for two sets of guests, getting things off to a less-than-perfect start

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest that began at Avalon Guest House in Cornwall sees the BandBers meet up to air their grievances from that stay and the three others that followed. Two sets of BandBers have an argument over breakfast comments, while facilities failures prove to be a big point of contention. After the disagreements are settled, the payments are revealed and the winners are crowned

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Essex and Hertfordshire. Kirstie searches for a family home for couple Justin and Christie, who have spent the first five years of their relationship living 50 miles apart, and are desperate to finally live together and start a family. Phil helps Cara and Ben search for a family home near Bishops Stortford

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer step into the middle of a domestic deadlock in Wolverhampton. Gordon, Suky and their three children live in a four-bedroom home that they bought in 2011, lured by the promise of an indoor pool - but while that feature may still be making a splash, the rest of the house is sinking fast. Suky is desperate to escape as she loathes the gloomy interiors, the severe lack of storage and the claustrophobic, isolating kitchen. On the other hand, Gordon is firmly anchored, convinced that with a little help from Kirstie, their house could become the perfect family home

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Piers and police officer Emma plan to build a landmark 21st-century castle in Stratford-upon-Avon which at 1100 square metres, is the biggest ever build featured on the show. With plans to have a tower, castellations, a moat, arrow slits, loggia courtyards and futuristic technology, its set to be the first new listed castle in the UK for 100 years

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team at St Georges treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. Iain, 60, is rushed in by ambulance after falling 10ft off a ladder on to his head while fixing an air-conditioning unit. He has a deep laceration above his right eye and doctors cant guarantee he wont lose some of his sight. Student teacher Lloyd is helped into AandE by his friend Mollie after injuring his foot on an inflatable obstacle course on their last day at university. Lucy has had a trampolining accident in her familys garden and medics fear the 13-year-old may have suffered a neck injury

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Retired builder Roger has fallen 13ft from his daughters roof and the trauma team is concerned he may have badly injured his head, back and neck. Folk musician Tad, 29, has come to AandE after developing a dangerously high heart rate, and doctors must use an electric shock to try to get it back to normal. Meanwhile, 69-year-old Richard is brought in after being found unwell at home by his son, and there are fears he has developed a serious infection

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man has a blackout driving a van and crashes into a telegraph pole. This is the second time it has happened in as many weeks and paramedics are keen to find out why

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team at St Georges treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team treats two trauma patients arriving by helicopter on the hospitals new helipad. Eric, 75, collapsed shortly after falling from a ladder while pruning trees in his garden. He is stabilised and put in an induced coma while a CT scan is used to determine any internal injuries. IT consultant Mihhail, 29, is admitted after crashing his motorbike at high speed and again a CT scan is employed to look for hidden wounds. Hes later transferred to the Intensive Care Unit while specialists decide how to repair the damage to his liver and stop his internal bleeding. Meanwhile, 22-year-old performing arts student Maria complains of chest pains and 82-year-old Rusty is treated for a broken ankle sustained in a road accident

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks camping connoisseurs go in search of the perfect pitch in north Wales. Their first stop is the coastal campsite of Porth Iago on the Llyn Peninsula

However, some dusty decorations disappoint Kadir. After a trip to the beach for an afternoon of bodyboarding, Morgan reveals that he isnt a fan of camping

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Women Under Hitlers Flag
programme.desc: German women may be perceived as passive witnesses to the horrific crimes committed by the Nazi regime. However, as this documentary reveals many were active participants that were as brutal and merciless as their better-known, male counterparts. The first of two episodes begins with Hitlers arrival in power in 1933 and goes back to the roots of the indoctrination of young German girls within the female branch of the Hitler Youth (BDM)

programme.title: Iron Curtain: Living Under Soviet Occupation
programme.desc: In 1945, as his Red Army advanced towards Berlin to liberate Europe from Nazism, Stalin pursued another goal - to join the countries of Eastern Europe to his empire. In just a few years he succeeded in imposing the Soviet totalitarian model with an iron fist across Poland, Hungary, East Germany and Czechoslovakia. Citizens of those nations tell their stories of how their countries were occupied and transformed into communist states

programme.desc: The future looks bright for Donna Andersen when James Montgomery enters her life. But she soon makes a discovery that turns her marriage into a living nightmare

programme.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Award-winning journalist Paula Zahn goes beyond the headlines in search of fascinating mysteries from within Americas justice system

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: A traffic accident seemed to be the cause of the death of a teenage driver. However, an autopsy revealed a sinister crime and CCTV footage was referenced to find her killer

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Harold Shipman was a much-loved doctor. Millions watched the GP speaking on TV discussing the benefits of care, not knowing hed already killed dozens of patients

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In 2018, Steve Clayton died in unusual circumstances. His body was found at the bottom of the stairs and the autopsy showed signs of poisoning

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Brett and Mona Wehde lived a quiet life in sleepy rural Iowa raising their three children. When a new family arrived, relationships were made. However, behind closed doors a wicked plot was hatched leading to the fatal shooting of 20-year-old Dustin Wehde in December 2001

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: In Dallas, Texas, surgical patients were falling victim to a monster with a medical degree. Dr Christopher Duntsch - aka Dr Death - was later found guilty of gross malpractice

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder return to examine more real-life cases, looking at the events leading up to crimes, going through the police investigations and summing up the trials. The first edition features two off-duty police men who showed extreme bravery after interrupting an armed robbery at a jewellers in Newark, Nottinghamshire, as well as a look at the the apparent suicide of a mother-of-three

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The case of Beth von Steinner. Days after she was reported missing, her frozen body was found behind her house. With no witnesses or suspects, only CCTV footage could reveal the exact fate that had behallen her

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A mother calls on Texas Ranger Jim Holland, desperate for his help to solve the cold case murder of her son Joseph, executed in the East Texas woods

programme.title: Inside the Arrest
programme.desc: A plot to kidnap TV presenter Holly Willoughby is discovered when an undercover cop in the US spots something suspicious in an online chat room

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The 2014 murder of Jessica Padgett, who was last seen on surveillance cameras driving into a car parking space and walking down an alley

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: The disturbing methods of female killers, who often take a less violent approach to murder than their male counterparts but can prove just as ruthless

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: How technology such as mobile phones, CCTV and cashpoints can help solve murder investigations

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The case of nursing student Michelle Le, whose body was found in a remote Californian canyon four months after she disappeared in May 2011. Giselle Esteban was later found guilty of murdering the 26-year-old after she became jealous of her relationship Le had with the father of her child

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The case of student Kenia Monge, who disappeared without a trace. The search hit dead ends until detectives uncovered chilling surveillance footage, revealing what had befallen her

Horror spoof, starring Kenny Everett, Vincent Price and Pamela Stephenson
